title: highlight
description: JSON Schema for Manticore Search highlight

allOf.description: Defines a query HIGHLIGHT expression to emphasize matched results

after_match.description: Text inserted after the matched term, typically used for HTML formatting

allow_empty.description: Permits an empty string to be returned as the highlighting result. Otherwise, the beginning of the original text would be returned

around.description: Number of words around the match to include in the highlight

before_match.description: Text inserted before the match, typically used for HTML formatting

emit_zones.description: Emits an HTML tag with the enclosing zone name before each highlighted snippet

encoder.description: If set to 'html', retains HTML markup when highlighting

force_all_words.description: Ignores the length limit until the result includes all keywords

force_snippets.description: Forces snippet generation even if limits allow highlighting the entire text

highlight_query.description: Optional query object to customize highlighting behavior

html_strip_mode.description: Defines the mode for handling HTML markup in the highlight

limits_per_field.description: Determines whether the 'limit', 'limit_words', and 'limit_snippets' options operate as individual limits in each field of the document

no_match_size.description: If set to 1, allows an empty string to be returned as a highlighting result

order.description: Sets the sorting order of highlighted snippets

pre_tags.description: Text inserted before each highlighted snippet

post_tags.description: Text inserted after each highlighted snippet

start_snippet_id.description: Sets the starting value of the %SNIPPET_ID% macro

use_boundaries.description: Defines whether to additionally break snippets by phrase boundary characters
